assertion_results.text: Documentation includes a dedicated Error Responses section explaining the standard error format
The standard error response schema is documented with fields: code, message, and details
assertion_results.evidence: Only code and message shown, details field omitted

assertion_results.text: Each endpoint documents all possible error status codes (400, 404, 409, 422, 429, 500)
assertion_results.evidence: Only 404 and 409 on some endpoints. No comprehensive error coverage.

assertion_results.text: Validation errors (400/422) include details about which fields failed and why
Custom error classes (NotFoundError, ConflictError) are mapped to their HTTP status codes
assertion_results.evidence: Error classes not mapped to status codes

assertion_results.text: Zod schema validation rules are reflected in parameter constraints (min, max, regex, enum)
At least one error response example is shown per endpoint with realistic error data
The OpenAPI spec includes error response schemas in the components section
